extDescription.message: Save web images as PNG, JPG, or WebP locally, with optional copy path and local history.

notifySaveFailedNoImageUrl.message: Chrome did not provide an image URL for this item.

errorNoImageUrl.message: This page did not expose a usable image URL.

errorUnableReadImage.message: Unable to read this image. Some blob or protected images may be blocked on this page.

errorImageNotLoaded.message: The selected image is not fully loaded.

errorCanvasUnavailable.message: Canvas is unavailable on this page.

errorMissingFinalPath.message: Chrome did not expose the final local file path.

notifySavedAndCopiedMessage.message: Saved as $FORMAT$ and copied file path.

notifySavedCopyFailedMessage.message: Saved as $FORMAT$, but copying file path failed: $ERROR$

notifyInterruptedMessage.message: The download was interrupted before the file path could be copied.

optionsIntro.message: A fully local image context-menu extension. This first release keeps only the essentials: export quality, silent save, and local save history.

panelLanguageBody.message: Follow the browser interface language by default, or override it here explicitly.

panelQualityBody.message: PNG is always lossless. JPG and WebP use the quality values below, from 0.10 to 1.00.

panelSaveModeBody.message: When enabled, the extension tries to download directly without opening Save As itself. Chrome may still show a picker if browser download settings are configured to ask where to save each file. Filenames stay simple in v1 and prefer the original image name.

panelHistoryBody.message: History is stored in local browser storage only, with no remote service and no sqlite. Open it on demand from the button below.

historyEmpty.message: No save history yet. It will appear here after your first save.
